specific_question: How many secure coding guideline review sessions did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn conduct with the development team in Q3 2025?
answer: Internal engineering updates show that the cybersecurity specialist led 4 secure coding review sessions between July 1 and September 30, 2025, focusing on encryption handling and API request validation.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
